Perturb all GAM fits inside a reference_model

Source: R/draws.R
dot-perturb_reference_model.Rd

Draws independent posterior-coefficient samples for each analyte's gamm_fit. Used when amspaf_daily(reference = NULL) (total- concentration mode), where ref_norm enters the result directly and its uncertainty should be reflected. When background is subtracted via the same reference model, the reference-GAM contribution cancels and this function should NOT be called.

Usage

.perturb_reference_model(rm)

Arguments

rm

A reference_model from fit_reference_model().

Value

A copy of rm with each gamm_fit replaced by a posterior draw.
